scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ramo-ai/web && npm run build -w @ramo-ai/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @ramo-ai/web && npm run lint -w @ramo-ai/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @ramo-ai/web && npm run typecheck -w @ramo-ai/api
